# STRAT.043 ? Pre-mortem (Klein)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** decision_making_frameworks
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING_FRAMEWORKS
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Imagine project failed; work backward to causes; prospective hindsight; surface concerns; identify risks before starting

## Application
Assume failure; generate failure stories; identify causes; surface hidden concerns; mitigate risks proactively; reduce overconfidence

## Key Values
- Prospective hindsight
- Risk identification
- Concern surfacing
- Overconfidence reduction
- Proactive mitigation

philosophy, strategic-framework, decision_making_frameworks
